§6Ionized Particles§f are charged particles for research and processing.

§eTask:§f Obtain 1x §bCharged Pellet§f (pellet_charged)

§eObtaining:§f
• §bParticle Accelerator§f operations
• §bCyclotron§f byproducts
• Some reactor processes

§eUses:§f
• Advanced research recipes
• Material processing
• Component for exotic items
• Fusion fuel precursors

§aTip:§f Collect and store - useful for various end-game recipes.
